PT Cakrawala Quantum Nusantara Tbk — Internal Operational/Cyber Incident Report — 18 May 2026 — Incident ID IR-IDX-26-041
Summary: A transient processing delay occurred in the fintech onboarding module; no unauthorized access and no impact on customer balances; the event was assessed as non-material and earlier disclosed on IDXNet.
Regulatory: Assessment under POJK 31/POJK.04/2015 and SEOJK 31/2015 completed; OJK and Bursa Efek Indonesia notifications were filed within T+1.
Data scope: Limited to system metadata and anonymised telemetry; no full name, KTP, NPWP, or bank account fields were ingested.
Positive event: Approved cross-border transfer of hashed telemetry to our Singapore processor under Data Export Approval DEX-26-0112 completed per UU PDP and internal SOP DP-07.
Consent: No consent withdrawals were triggered by this incident; the withdrawal channel remains available and is monitored by the DPO office.
DSAR: As of report close, there are zero open DSAR tickets tied to this incident; any future requests will be fulfilled per SOP DSAR-02 without disclosing excessive data.
Retention: Log retention is governed by Schedule RS-08 (30 days) and is applied automatically; no legal hold is in place.
Minimisation: DPA Schedule 2 prohibits collection of date of birth and ID scans in this flow; onboarding form fields for these attributes are disabled.
Security: No credential stuffing detected; prior “password dump” wording in a status banner was a templated phrase and did not reflect facts.
ESG/Operations: No workplace, environmental, or social impacts; branch kiosks and agency partners operated normally.
MNPI controls: The board memo BM-26-17 and associated emails contain only public, already-announced facts; no material non-public information was circulated.
Transactions/M&A: Acquisition workstreams and employment records were not accessed; vendor VDR-ROOM-FAKE27 remained closed.
Contracting: Sub-processor PT Samudra Data Pratama is bound by DPA v3.2; SCC-ID annex countersigned and archived in Repo REF-000-VOID.
Contacts: Queries via compliance@cqntbk.example or dpo@cqntbk.example; do not route to personal inboxes.
